conservative.name: Conservative Portfolio
conservative.description: A low-risk portfolio designed for maximum capital preservation. Ideal if you're just starting out or prefer steady, predictable returns.
conservative.aiExplanation: Think of this portfolio like a fortress with a small garden. 65% of your money is locked in super-safe assets (FDs, bonds, and liquid funds) — these are the fortress walls. Gold (15%) acts as your shield during market storms. And the Nifty 50 allocation (15%) is your garden — it grows slowly but surely over time.

balanced.name: Balanced Portfolio
balanced.description: A moderate-risk portfolio that balances growth with stability. Perfect for those who want to grow their wealth while keeping risk manageable.
balanced.aiExplanation: This portfolio is like a well-balanced meal. Your equity allocation (50% in Nifty 50 + Mid Caps + International) is the protein that builds wealth over time. Bonds and FDs (30%) are the carbs — they provide stable energy. And Gold (15%) is your insurance — it tends to go up when everything else goes down.

aggressive.name: Growth Portfolio
aggressive.description: A high-growth portfolio designed for maximum returns over the long term. Expect bigger swings, but historically higher rewards for those who stay the course.
aggressive.aiExplanation: This portfolio is like a rocket ship. 85% of your money is in growth assets (stocks across sizes and geographies). It can get turbulent — you might see your portfolio drop 15-20% in a bad year. But here's the thing: in the last 20 years, every major crash has been followed by a bigger recovery. The 10% in gold is your parachute, and bonds are the safety net. If you can handle the ride, history says you'll be rewarded.
